objective:
FICHE_STRATEGIE v1
id: momentum_macd
archetype: momentum_macd
family: momentum
timeframe: 1h
side: both
indicators:
- macd(fast_period=14, slow_period=23, signal_period=7)
- rsi(period=8)
- atr(period=14)
entry:
- long: cross_up(macd.macd, macd.signal) and rsi > 45 and rsi < 65
- short: cross_down(macd.macd, macd.signal) and rsi > 30 and rsi < 60
exit:
- condition: sign_change(macd.histogram) or rsi > 80 or rsi < 20
risk:
stop_atr_mult: 2.0
tp_atr_mult: 3.5
description: ATR stop-loss (2.0x) and take-profit (3.5x)
constraints:
- no_lookahead: true
- only_registry_indicators: true

iterations.hypothesis: FICHE_STRATEGIE v1 uses the MACD momentum indicator in combination with RSI and ATR to generate long and short trading signals.

pre_reflection.text:
[Pre-reflection] I will review the strategy for its robustness and potential weaknesses, considering the current market conditions. If results are poor (negative return), I would try to adjust entry criteria or risk management parameters. For mediocre returns (low Sharpe ratio), I would focus on improving exit criteria or optimizing risk-return trade-offs. In case of failure, I will investigate alternative approaches and consider using a machine learning approach if necessary.
[Backup plan] If results are poor, I would try to adjust the entry conditions by adding more filters like volume or moving average crossovers. If returns remain low, I could also experiment with different risk management parameters such as changing stop-loss/take-profit multipliers. For mediocre performance, I will explore optimization of exit criteria and consider a mean reversion strategy.
